title: phyllanthus cladanthus
intro: Phyllanthus cladanthus, also known as the golden waxy capsule, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Africa and Asia. The leaves and fruits of Phyllanthus cladanthus contain medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including liver and kidney diseases. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and enhancing the immune system. Phyllanthus cladanthus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
